message:
🐛 Fix live font size: clearTextureAtlas + vitest test suite (#155)

xterm.js caches font glyphs in a texture atlas. When fontSize changes,
the atlas retains stale glyphs causing no visible update until page
reload. Call clearTextureAtlas() after setting fontSize to force the
renderer to rebuild glyphs with the new metrics.

Also adds vitest test infrastructure with 8 tests covering:
- fontSize option read/write
- Multi-terminal font updates (simulating termInstances)
- localStorage persistence
- clearTextureAtlas integration
- Double-rAF + fit scheduling pattern

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
